title: Global Demand for Rare Earth Minerals Is Intensifying Criminal Threats in the Amazon Rainforest
summary_full: Global demand for critical minerals, used to build drones and electric cars, is surging, setting of a new wave of criminality in the world’s largest rainforest.
summary_public: Global demand for critical minerals, used to build drones and electric cars, is surging, setting of a new wave of criminality in the world’s largest rainforest.
